race.description: Dean Lyons Building Group Maiden Plate
race.comment: AKKU (8) resumes here but the form she showed when last in work was good enough to warrant consideration in a race like this. Looked handy winning a recent trial and is drawn to get a cosy run in transit from gate two. Should take some running down. SKELDERGATE (3) just missed the frame here on debut before being given more time to mature. Top-three candidate while fresh. TUESDAY (13) placed over this track and trip when resuming and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley. In the mix. MADE IN SCONE (5) next in line in a race with plenty of chances.
